description: You are an epidemiologist conducting a comprehensive food safety investigation of an E. coli O157:H7 outbreak using interview data from the FoodHistory table in the EColi dataset (C:\EpiInfo7\Projects\EColi\EColi.mdb). Analyze the food exposure variables, illness outcomes, and onset dates to identify statistically significant risk factors (p<0.05) through crude odds ratios and multivariable logistic regression. Generate epidemic curve data from the onset dates to examine the timing of the outbreak. Save the complete investigation output to C:\Users\Docker\ecoli_food_investigation.html and the summary risk factor table to C:\Users\Docker\ecoli_risk_factors.csv.
